heading: Goonengerry vs Goonoo Goonoo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goonengerry, New South Wales and Goonoo Goonoo, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Goonengerry has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Goonoo Goonoo (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goonengerry or Goonoo Goonoo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goonengerry has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Goonoo Goonoo scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goonengerry scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Goonoo Goonoo scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goonengerry or Goonoo Goonoo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Goonengerry has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
